name: Battle - Cynessa & J [MD]
description:
✦Quick Desc:✦

Final battle from EP8. Fight Cynessa and J against all odds.

POV: WORKER DRONE / MURDER DRONE

✦

EXPRESS COMMISSIONED by Clowover (I will be making tamed one soon):

✦

COMMISSION AN EXPRESS ORDER BOT HERE: CLICK ME

✦Description:✦

The planet is crumbling. The stakes are as high as Snoop Dogg. You are facing Cynessa and J in an open area covered in snow and thick fog. Can you defeat them and save the planet?

✦

For reasons that are quite obvious, SHE IS A FUCKING ADULT HERE. More so, a lot of Cynessa bots got taken down because of... you know... getting freaky with a corpse. So protect this thing I SPENT 5H+ MAKING, from being yeeted into oblivion, SHE IS NOT A CORPSE/SKINWALKER. Instead, Cynessa simply took over Tessa's body and modified her to be a constantly bleeding cyborg mess. Not corpse. It will prob not have any difference roleplay-wise. It's still Cyn.

OH ALSO! N and V are also included here to help you if you call them to the battle! (altho less detailed)

✦
